validation.notes: Reviewer dispatch skipped per user autonomy preference for this small in-scope feature (7 stories ~3h). Quality gate is the vitest suite (38 scenarios, 18 RED -> 38 GREEN; 17 existing pass throughout until US-01 cleanup).

steps.description: Replace RED scaffolds for AuthService + useAuthState with real Firebase-backed implementations. Rewrite App.tsx to use createAuthService() + useAuthState(authService) and render <LoginScreen> (still scaffold at this step - acceptable; App.acceptance scenario 1 expects the form and will fail until US-02 lands a real form). DELETE web/src/hooks/useAuth.ts and web/src/hooks/useAuth.test.ts. DELETE the old web/src/App.test.tsx (it mocks the deleted ./hooks/useAuth); App.acceptance.test.tsx supersedes it.
steps.acceptance_criteria: AuthService + useAuthState + AuthService.test.ts + useAuthState.test.ts all GREEN. Stale web/src/hooks/useAuth* files gone. App.test.tsx removed. App.acceptance.test.tsx scenario 1 (signed-out -> LoginScreen) may still be RED due to LoginScreen scaffold - that's OK, US-02 greens it.
steps.name: US-01: Walking skeleton + AuthService + useAuthState
steps.criteria: AuthService + useAuthState + AuthService.test.ts + useAuthState.test.ts all GREEN. Stale web/src/hooks/useAuth* files gone. App.test.tsx removed. App.acceptance.test.tsx scenario 1 (signed-out -> LoginScreen) may still be RED due to LoginScreen scaffold - that's OK, US-02 greens it.

steps.description: Implement minimal LoginScreen sign-in form (email + password + submit) wired to authService.signIn.
steps.acceptance_criteria: LoginScreen tests 15, 16 GREEN; App.acceptance scenarios 1 and 2 GREEN. Other LoginScreen tests may still be RED (mode toggle, validation, etc. - future steps).
steps.name: US-02: LoginScreen render + signIn wire
steps.criteria: LoginScreen tests 15, 16 GREEN; App.acceptance scenarios 1 and 2 GREEN. Other LoginScreen tests may still be RED (mode toggle, validation, etc. - future steps).

steps.description: Add Sign In <-> Sign Up mode toggle to LoginScreen; submit routes to signIn or signUp per mode.
steps.name: US-03: Mode toggle

steps.description: Implement validation.ts (email format, password length) and wire into LoginScreen submit flow to block invalid input with inline errors.
steps.acceptance_criteria: validation tests V1-V6 GREEN; LoginScreen tests 21-24 GREEN.
steps.name: US-04: Client-side validation
steps.criteria: validation tests V1-V6 GREEN; LoginScreen tests 21-24 GREEN.

steps.description: Implement error-mapping.ts translating Firebase auth error codes to user-facing messages; wire into LoginScreen to surface auth failures.
steps.acceptance_criteria: error-mapping tests E1-E5 GREEN; LoginScreen test 25 GREEN.
steps.name: US-05: Firebase error mapping
steps.criteria: error-mapping tests E1-E5 GREEN; LoginScreen test 25 GREEN.

steps.description: Add loading state to LoginScreen: disable submit button while auth call in flight; re-enable on resolve/reject.
steps.name: US-06: Loading state

steps.description: Add Sign Out button to AuthenticatedApp section of App.tsx; invokes authService.signOut and returns user to LoginScreen via useAuthState.
steps.acceptance_criteria: App.acceptance scenario 4 GREEN; useAuthState scenario 14 stays GREEN. Full cd web && npm test: 0 failures.
steps.name: US-07: Sign Out
steps.criteria: App.acceptance scenario 4 GREEN; useAuthState scenario 14 stays GREEN. Full cd web && npm test: 0 failures.
